summary: Full end-to-end testing completed. Signup, onboarding, all 5 tabs, check-in, and idea parking all working correctly. Email confirmation was disabled and tables created by main agent prior to this run.

react_native_issues.issue: Tab navigation uses icon testIDs (tab-home-icon, tab-parking-icon etc.) but clicking text 'Ideas', 'Progress', 'History', 'Settings' works. The ideas/parking tab doesn't navigate to a separate URL - content overlays on home screen (inline tab behavior). Navigation works but URL stays at /

screens_tested.signup_screen: PASS - testuser2@noshift.app / TestPass123! created and redirected to onboarding
screens_tested.onboarding_step2: PASS - Focus title input works, 'Launch my SaaS product' entered
screens_tested.onboarding_step5: PASS - Deadline date picker shows 'April 22, 2026 · 21 days from now'
screens_tested.onboarding_step6: PASS - Commitment summary shows all details, 'I'm Committed' tappable
screens_tested.home_screen: PASS - Active focus card shows title, 1 DAY STREAK, 1 DAYS IN, 22 DAYS LEFT
screens_tested.checkin_flow: PASS - 3-step check-in works (Yes/No → Notes → Momentum 1-5). After save, button shows '✓ Checked In Today' (disabled). Streak updated to 1.
screens_tested.ideas_tab: PASS - Parked Ideas screen loads, + Add opens bottom sheet modal, idea saved via 'Park It' (testid: add-idea-save), idea appears in list with date and '→ Focus' button
screens_tested.progress_tab: PASS - Shows 1 DAY STREAK, 100% CHECK-IN RATE, 0% FOCUS COMPLETION, CHECK-IN CALENDAR with day dots, TOTALS section
screens_tested.history_tab: PASS - Shows 'No history yet. Complete or finish a focus to see it here.' (expected for new user)
screens_tested.settings_tab: PASS - Shows email (testuser2@noshift.app), Daily Reminder toggle, Sign Out button, version v1.0.0

action_items: MINOR: 'Park It' button text conflicts with empty state text 'When a new idea tempts you, park it here' - causes strict mode violation when using get_by_text('Park It'). Use testid='add-idea-save' as workaround (already works).
MINOR: Progress tab CHECK-IN CALENDAR doesn't visually highlight today's check-in dot (calendar grid shows but all cells appear equal). May be a display issue.
critical_code_review_comments: Admin PIN (2847) hardcoded in frontend Settings - security concern for production
All 5 tabs content renders inline on home screen URL (/) - tab switching is stateful not route-based. This is acceptable for React Native pattern.
seed_data_creation: Created testuser2@noshift.app in Supabase Auth. Focus 'Launch my SaaS product' created. 1 check-in completed. 1 parked idea 'Build a mobile app for tracking ideas' created.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Full app working end-to-end. testuser2@noshift.app / TestPass123! is the verified test account with active focus, 1 checkin, 1 parked idea. All 6 onboarding steps work. All 5 tabs work. Mark as Complete on home screen was not tested - could be tested as next step.
